text.title: UTM Taxonomy Discipline Core Rules
text.summary: 5 testable rules every UTM Taxonomy Discipline application must enforce. These are HARD rules — user-supplied input cannot override them.

rule.statement: Source MUST be one of ≤12 closed values; free-text source is rejected.
rule.rationale: Free-text source explodes the analytics vocabulary and breaks WoW comparisons.

rule.statement: Medium MUST be one of ≤6 closed values; free-text medium is rejected.
All UTM values MUST be kebab-case lowercase; mixed-case or snake_case is rejected.
rule.rationale: Case mismatch produces phantom segments ('Twitter' vs 'twitter' vs 'TWITTER').

rule.statement: Campaign id MUST follow yyyymmdd-asset-slug pattern; ad-hoc campaign names are rejected.
rule.rationale: Pattern-bound campaign ids let you sort/filter chronologically and align to asset rows in the calendar.

rule.statement: Operator MUST use the link-builder; manual UTM typing is rejected.
rule.rationale: Manual typing introduces typos that destroy WoW continuity.
